author: PolarPandy
text: I fell in love with KCD2 from the first few frames...

author: Emi
text: Thank you for creating this amazing and beatiful story and for bringing so many people together with it.

author: Bilios
text:
Coming from a teen that's almost an adult and had his teenage years flooded by KCD, I couldn't be more thankful. I was born and raised in Spain, but having Czech parents only brought Czech culture to me growing up. I discovered the game thanks to Xbox Gamepass back in 2020 and I fell in love with the game even before finding out it was made by a Czech company and had a medieval Bohemia setting. Five years later I finally had the chance to explore both KCD and KCD II's locations in real life while also visiting family in the Czech Republic, a trip my parents and I absolutely loved, as they always love a bit of Czech culture in media and a nice excuse to visit more of the country after living in a dry and 'brown' part of Spain for a few decades. 
 Much love, Warhorse! We are very thankful for everything you've done.

author: Peasant from Peasantstan
text: Dear, Warhorse team! I'd like to express my deepest gratitude for your work! KCD and KCD2 have become more than just games for me. They are now a part of my life and my inspiration. Thanks to you, I've not only rekindled my long-held dream of writing my own story, but I've also begun to realize it. And as a devoted yet patient fan, I'm ready to wait forever for the threequel.

author: Lopiz / Lorraine N.
text:
Dear Warhorse Studios Team, 
 I just wanted to thank you for the incredible experience you created with Kingdom Come: Deliverance. It’s not only an amazing game series in terms of storytelling, immersion, and historical depth, but it also had a truly meaningful impact on me. Through the world you built, I discovered a deeper appreciation for Central European history and culture. It even led me to travel to the Czech Republic multiple times, visit the locations that inspired the game, and reconnect with my creativity through new personal and artistic projects. 
 Your work has been genuinely inspiring and, in many ways, life-changing. It reminded me how powerful games can be in connecting people, cultures, and stories. Thank you for creating something so special. 
 Warm regards,  
 AUDENTES!

author: Nilanya
text: Thanks to Kingdom Come Deliverance I found an amazing community, even better friends, and made so many wonderful memories with them together (two concerts, many more gatherings, and soon two vacations). My life truly got better thanks to the world and the games Warhorse created! Thank you so much! <3

author: Shimmeren
text: Before KCD and KCD2 I had no idea how much I craved something fresh and unique, something without dragons, elves and magic. The world created by Warhorse became a true revelation to me - the story, the music, the voice acting, the attention to detail - every minute of gameplay felt like I was discovering the world of video games anew. Thank you for letting me experience this!

author: MT
text:
Found a home with a wicked people my age. I've never travelled to a country so much and in such short time. In my very busy life, KCD2 was a shining light. 
 Just getting into that world, feeling the sunshine and the wind, it satisfied my adventure soul. 
 All thanks to the amazing team at Warhorse studios.

author: Mitculka
text:
Moc děkuju za KCD 2! Doopravdy mi naprosto změnilo život. Předtím jsem nic nehrála, ani jsem neměla na čem, ale KCD 2 mě tak zaujalo, že jsem si půl roku od kamaráda půjčovala jeho druhý notebook, abych mohla hrát. Pak jsem dostala SteamDeck a najednou můžu hrát co chci a kdy chci (i KCD 1). Přidala se do celé té skvělé komunity, která kolem vaší úžasné hry vznikla. Můj život je tak jiný, že kdyby mi to někdo před rokem řekl, jen bych nevěřícně kroutila hlavou.
 Je to hra našich srdcí, pro mě osobně znamená strašně moc a miluju každý její aspekt – příběh, grafiku, hudbu, všechny vtípky i celé realistické ztvárněné české historie. Vidět Jindřicha běhat po mapě mě vždycky hřeje u srdce. Na Kutnohorsku a Trosecku se cítím doma, i když bydlím v Brně. 
 DĚKUJU! Udělali jste něco neskutečného.

author: VampyreGremlin
text: The game has been such a breath of fresh air. I'm so grateful it exists.

author: Pepper
text:
Kingdom Come: Deliverance II is a game that has certainly secured its place in the history of the RPG genre; its dedication to realism and historical authenticity created an experience that feels truly unique and will be remembered for years to come. 
 But its impact goes far beyond the game itself: thanks to its tribute to Czech history, it has sparked new waves of historical tourism from people all over the world, helped restore historical sites, and allowed history to be experienced in a modern world.
 KCD fans have nurtured a passionate community of inspiring, creative, and talented individuals who brought the game beyond the digital world and into real life, coming together to celebrate the game that we all love.

author: Liz_B
text: I could never imagine how much one game can change someone’s life. KCD2 is a true masterpiece in gaming industry which brought me so much joy I wish I can erase my memory and play it again. Thank you so much for it! It’s genuinely one of the best games of all time!

author: GlambringGaming
text:
To everyone at Warhorse Studios,
 I just wanted to say thank you. The Kingdom Come: Deliverance series has meant more to me than you’ll ever know.
 This past year has been really tough, and your game became a place I could escape to. The world you created feels so real — the music, landscapes, and people who feel like actual human beings rather than just characters.
 What drew me in most was the storytelling and humanity of the characters. They feel flawed, believable, and alive, and that made me fall in love with the franchise.
 And yes… even when you make me carry sacks, fetch things, or get skewered by someone better with a sword, it all adds to the charm and immersion.
 Thank you for creating something so grounded and full of heart. I can’t wait to see where the journey goes next.

author: Jessykitaa
text:
Thank you for creating a game with so much care. Its story, its atmosphere, and its music have impacted me like no game ever has before. For me, it has been an explosion of creativity, a way to meet new friends, and to expand my horizons like I never imagined. 
 Thank you for bringing to life a game that truly changes lives.

author: Queen of Pookies
text:
Dear Warhorse team, thank you for creating KCD and KCD2. These games have become so much more than just games for so many of us. I didn’t believe games could actually change lives, but yours did. They literally saved mine.  It’s amazing that you made something so grounded, immersive, and full of heart. Not every game can touch people this deeply. The Story, music, the living world of Bohemia, and flawed but real characters made it feel truly alive. For hundreds of hours we could all step into that medieval world, laugh, cry, and feel like we belonged there. You gave us something so special, so majestic, THANK YOU for all of it. 
 You all are the G.O.A.T! 
 Audentes fortuna iuvat!!!

author: Fountain 1403
text: Warhorse quickly gained a spot in the hearts of it's players because of the immediately clear care ,skill, and talent put forth by everyone involved. What they crafted is nothing short of groundbreaking, from the storyline to the visual language of the game, the immersion and mechanics, the humor and heart in the writing, and the consistant internal logic. It feels like a love letter to storytelling, to gamers, and to the preservation of history. I will never forget the moment I realized just how special this game is. Forever etched in my heart and soul. Thank you for the unparalleled experience. My love to you all. -Fountain 1403

author: Fletcher the Warlock
text:
Kingdom Come Deliverance 1 & 2 are more than just simple games. They're masterpieces, created with love for detail, dedication and hard work! The music, the story, the characters and the whole world you created in those games is stunningly beautiful! I'm glad I discovered these games, and I could totally lose myself in it.  
 Thank you all for your hard work, for creating the most beautiful games I ever played! 
 Games that brought together an amazing community I've never experienced before!  
 Your games truly changed not just my life but also the lifes of so many people!! I found new and wonderful friends, and had some of the most amazing days in my life since I dived into your amazing games!! 
 So THANK YOU FOR EVERYTHING!!

author: The Charlatan
text: I'd like to express my gratitude to the Warhorse team - to each person whose hard work and dedication gave us this amazing top-tier game like KCD2. You are the most talented and great people that can't be replaced <3 <3 Much love, keep up good work and hopefully we'll see more of you in the future!
